---
title: "Jian Wu"
image: assets/avatar/jian-wu.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: rectangle
#  Afflicate:
#  [State Key Laboratory of Virtual Reality Technology and Systems](http://vrlab.buaa.edu.cn)
#  [School of Computer Science and Engineering](http://scse.buaa.edu.cn/index.htm)
#  [Beihang University](https://www.buaa.edu.cn)
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: lanayawj@buaa.edu.cn
      href: mailto:lanayawj@buaa.edu.cn
    - icon: github
      text: JianWu
      href: https://github.com/jianwu-buaa
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3863-8814
    - icon: 📝
      text: CV
      href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Dr. Jian Wu is an assistant researcher at the State Key Laboratory of Virtual Reality Technology and Systems, Beihang University, and received his Ph.D. from Beihang University in 2024. His research interests include extended reality (XR) immersive interaction and real-time graphics rendering. He has published over 30 papers in top conferences and journals such as IJHCS, IJHCI, IEEE TVCG, VR, and ISMAR, and received a Best Paper nomination at IEEE VR 2025 and the Best Student Journal Paper Award at IEEE ISMAR 2024.

## Research Interests

- VR/AR interaction techniques and user perception
- Foveated rendering and neural scene representation
- Scene-aware layout, navigation, and object arrangement in immersive environments
- Haptic retargeting and multimodal interaction in VR

## Highlights

- International Journal of Human-Computer Studies, 2026
- IEEE TVCG / IEEE VR / IEEE ISMAR publications
- VR 2025 Best Paper Honorable Mention (Fov-GS)
- ISMAR 2024 Best Student Journal Paper (VPRF)

## Education

2018 – 2024: Ph.D. in Computer Application Technology
School of Computer Science and Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing, China

2015 – 2018: M.S. in Mechanical Engineering (Major in Mechanical Design)
School of Mechanical Engineering and Automation, Beihang University, Beijing, China

2011 – 2015: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering and Automation
School of Mechanical Engineering and Automation, Beihang University, Beijing, China

## Professional Experience

2024 – Present: Assistant Researcher
State Key Laboratory of Virtual Reality Technology and Systems, Beihang University, Beijing, China

:::
